name: Hawaiian-Portuguese Sweet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mashed potatoes and water.
2. Stir in lemon extract and grated lemon peel.
3. Mix in sugar, butter, and salt until well combined.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in flour mixture until just mixed.
5. Add yeast and dough enhancer; mix until smooth.
6. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead briefly.
7. Place dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
8. Punch down the dough and shape into a loaf.
9. Place on a baking sheet and bake at Basic White Bread setting for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and crust is firm to the touch.
10. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
